name: Cocktail Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the mayonnaise, flour, eggs, and milk until well combined.
2. Add the remaining ingredients: crabmeat, shrimp, Swiss cheese, and chopped green onions.
3. Pour the mixture into a partially cooked frozen pie shell.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
